title: Ramagiri Fort
tagline: Ramagiri Fort — heritage city of Telangana

overview.short: The Ramagiri Fort, also known as Ramagiri Khilla, located over a mountain top, is in the Peddapalli district of the Indian state of Telangana.
overview.description: The Ramagiri Fort, also known as Ramagiri Khilla, located over a mountain top, is in the Peddapalli district of the Indian state of Telangana. in ramagiri khilla the Hanuman statue was constructed by Gaddam Bapu from mancherial district. The family member will visit every year and make pray and worship for lord Hanuman.

topPlaces.name: Kalvacherla
topPlaces.description: Kalvacherla is a village of Ramagiri mandal located in the Peddapalli district of the state of Telangana in India. Kalvacherla is located 17 km (11 mi) away from District Headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Centenary Colony
topPlaces.description: Centenary colony is the Mandal Headquarters for Ramagiri Mandal and it is a township of the Singareni Collieries Company located near to 8th Incline Colony, Godavarikhani, in Peddapalli district, Telangana state, India. The name "centenary" given to the colony as a significance for digging the coal from past 100 years.

topPlaces.name: Godavari Valley Coalfield
topPlaces.description: Godavari Valley Coalfield is located in the districts of Adilabad, Karimnagar, Khammam and Warangal in the Indian state of Telangana. It is the only coalfield in South India.

topPlaces.name: Madupalli
topPlaces.description: Madupalli is a village in the Ainavilli Mandal and East godavari district in Andhrapradesh.

topPlaces.name: Kamanpur
topPlaces.description: Kamanpur is a Mandal in Peddapalli district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Kamanpur mandal of Peddapalli revenue division.

items.note: Kalvacherla is a village of Ramagiri mandal located in the Peddapalli district of the state of Telangana in India. Kalvacherla is located 17 km (11 mi) away from District Headquarters.

Centenary colony is the Mandal Headquarters for Ramagiri Mandal and it is a township of the Singareni Collieries Company located near to 8th Incline Colony, Godavarikhani, in Peddapalli district, Telangana state, India. The name "centenary" given to the colony as a significance for digging the coal from past 100 years.
Godavari Valley Coalfield is located in the districts of Adilabad, Karimnagar, Khammam and Warangal in the Indian state of Telangana. It is the only coalfield in South India.
Madupalli is a village in the Ainavilli Mandal and East godavari district in Andhrapradesh.
Kamanpur is a Mandal in Peddapalli district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Kamanpur mandal of Peddapalli revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ramagiri Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ramagiri Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ramagiri Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (190 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (168 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ramagiri Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ramagiri Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ramagiri Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Ramagiri Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ramagiri Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalvacherla, Centenary Colony, Godavari Valley Coalfield, Madupalli, Kamanpur.
